title: Pinch to zoom
drDigitalIntro: What if you'd like to zoom in on pictures or text? Spread two fingers apart on the trackpad to make something bigger, or move two fingers closer together to make it smaller. In the activity, open the browser and use the three-dot menu (⋮) next to the search icon to zoom in — then find the hidden number in the text!

playgroundTask.instructions: Open the browser, then click the ⋮ menu next to the search icon and choose Zoom In to make the text bigger. Find the hidden number that appears, then type the full code.

drDigitalSuccess: You zoomed in and found the hidden code — great detective work!
drDigitalHint: Click the three dots ⋮ next to the search icon in the browser toolbar, then choose Zoom In. Keep zooming until you can read the tiny hidden number, then type the full code.
